location: Purchased for 600 runes from a Nomadic Merchant camped beneath a collapsed stone structure southeast of the Coastal Cave entrance, in western Limgrave.

source.name: Nomadic Merchant (West Limgrave, near Coastal Cave)

tactics: No fight needed — just reach the merchant's fire beneath the collapsed structure down the beach from Coastal Cave.
Bandit-class characters already start with a Shortbow in their inventory, so they never need to buy one.
It's also a rare (2%) drop from bow-wielding Marionette Soldiers if you'd rather not spend runes.
It's the cheapest, lowest-requirement Light Bow, useful as an early poke/pull tool for almost any build, and usable on horseback.
lore: A basic, unadorned hunting bow valued for how quickly it can loose successive arrows, and for how well it handles when fired from horseback.

builds.name: Starter/any-class ranged utility
builds.why: Cheap, low-requirement, and workable from horseback, making it a fine early pulling or poke tool for nearly any build.

builds.name: Bandit rogue archer
builds.why: Native starting weapon of the Bandit class, pairing naturally with its high starting Dexterity and stealth-oriented kit.
